## Setup

- Screen reader and version (e.g. NVDA 2025.1):
- Operating system:
- App version / commit:

## What you tried

(e.g. created cells, ran Python, navigated output, used find, opened a
Jupyter notebook with images…)

## What worked well

## What was confusing, silent, or broken

For each problem, if you can:
- What you pressed
- What was announced (or not announced)
- What you expected to hear

## Anything else

Partial reports are absolutely welcome — even "the first five minutes" helps.
